title: A Change of Heart
overview: Beatrice, recently widowed by a far right sympathetic policeman, lives with her son & mother. She doesn’t like migrant and foreigners. When she meets Mokhtar, an Iranian entered illegally in France, her world crumbles. This is the beginning of a passionate love story leading Beatrice to defy her racist entourage and the law so that he can cross the Channel.

trailers.title: ILS SONT VIVANTS de Jérémie Elkaïm | BANDE-ANNONCE
